caption: A man with dark skin and glasses wears a tall, grey, textured wig, a white collared shirt, a red bow tie, and tan suspenders. He is wearing black over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a black professional microphone. He is in a room decorated with framed pictures and clothing on racks, including a yellow garment with the word "LEE" visible. On the left side of the scene, a circular logo contains the text "TALK JOY PODCAST," while a red and white logo on the right side reads "TALK JOY." Across the sequence, the man remains in a static position, speaking into the microphone. His facial expressions shift slightly as he talks, with his mouth opening and closing, while the background and equipment remain stationary.
